zh.lifeSummary: 當William Heron於大約1240年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯時，他的父親William Heron24歲，母親Emeline de Héron16歲。他與Christian Notton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1296年12月10日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Heron was born about 1240, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, his father, William Heron, was 24 and his mother, Emeline de Héron, was 16. He married Christian Notton. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 December 1296, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Heron est né environ 1240, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Heron, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emeline de Héron, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Christian Notton. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1296, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: William Heron(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Heron(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Emeline de Héron(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Christian Notton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 12월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Heron родился около 1240 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Heron было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emeline de Héron, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Notton. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 декабря 1296 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
